rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (BenchVar), shows where the draft drifts from it (by conflating three contributions and ordering them backwards), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (e.g., 'fully automated ACMG/AMP classification', 'new standard for downstream clinical reporting').
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (unsupported clinical-deployment claims).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
